name: medical-medium-cleanse-to-heal
description: Anthony William's 'Medical Medium Cleanse to Heal' — a comprehensive guide to healing chronic illness through cleansing protocols. Covers the 3:6:9 Cleanse (the main protocol), Anti-Bug Cleanse, Heavy Metal Detox, Morning Cleanse, Mono Eating Cleanse, troublemaker foods, supplements, and the spiritual side of healing. The author channels health information from a 'Spirit of Compassion.'
useCase: Understanding and implementing Medical Medium cleansing protocols for chronic illness, learning the 3:6:9 Cleanse structure, identifying troublemaker foods, choosing the right cleanse for specific conditions, and supporting healing with supplements and recipes.
knownRisks: Author claims to receive information from a spirit — not scientifically validated
Some recommendations contradict conventional medical advice
Not a substitute for professional medical care
The cleansing protocols are intensive and may not be suitable for everyone
The book has been criticized by medical professionals as pseudoscience
